trigger.description: Operator has set `[search.lexical_ram_tier] enabled = false` (or `EE_LEXICAL_INDEX_PIN_RAM=0`) and a lexical index load runs. The loader short-circuits the pinning path, returns the operator-disabled fallback, and surfaces this code so `ee status --json` does not silently look identical to the unsupported-platform case.

expected_emission.repair_string: Set [search.lexical_ram_tier] enabled = true (or unset EE_LEXICAL_INDEX_PIN_RAM=0) and re-run to opt back into lexical posting-list RAM-tier pinning on supported Linux hosts.
